description: Add address constants for SN-A tone block (Common, Instrument-specific params, MFX). Common has 13 params (level, mono/poly, octave, cutoff/reso/atk/rel offsets, portamento, vibrato rate/depth/delay). Instrument params are at a fixed offset but the meaning varies by instrument type. Add SnAcousticState with common fields + generic inst_params Vec<u8>.
title: Core: SN-A address map and state types
